title: Moroccan Stuffed Crispy Rice Sheets
description: A crispy Moroccan-inspired dish made with stuffed rice sheets. Perfect as a snack or dessert.
instructions: Prepare the rice according to the package instructions.
Mix the chopped peppercorns, crumbly pastry, and Moroccan spices into the cooked rice.
Lay out the sheets of paper (or parchment paper) on a flat surface.
Place a tablespoon of the rice mixture onto one corner of each sheet.
Fold the sheet into a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with a little water and sprinkle with a pinch of salt.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
